name: Add markdown table-of-contents generator
issue_text: Create a bash function generate_toc() that reads a markdown file and outputs a table of contents based on ## and ### headings. It should output markdown links with proper anchor formatting (lowercase, hyphens for spaces). Write it as src/lib/toc-generator.sh with a main guard.

name: Add cycle duration tracker
issue_text: Create src/core/cycle-duration.sh that tracks wall-clock time per agent per cycle. Functions: start_timer(agent_id), stop_timer(agent_id), report_durations(). Store timestamps in a temp file. Output a markdown table of agent durations when report_durations is called.

name: Add multi-file refactoring task
issue_text: Add a new management command 'listmodels' that lists all installed models with their field counts. Create django/core/management/commands/listmodels.py with a Command class that iterates apps, gets models, counts fields, and outputs a formatted table. Add tests in tests/management/test_listmodels.py.
acceptance_criteria: test file with at least 2 test cases

name: Build config migration utility
issue_text: Create scripts/config-migrate.sh that migrates agents.conf between format versions. Support: v1 (current flat format) → v2 (INI-style with sections). Functions: detect_version(), migrate_v1_to_v2(), validate_migrated(). The v2 format groups agent config under [agent-name] sections. Include --dry-run and --backup flags.

name: Build cross-project dependency analyzer
issue_text: Create src/core/dep-analyzer.sh that analyzes source dependencies between src/core modules. It should: 1) scan all .sh files for 'source' statements, 2) build a dependency graph, 3) detect circular dependencies, 4) output a topological sort order. Functions: scan_sources(), build_graph(), detect_cycles(), topo_sort(), print_report(). Output as markdown.
